'''R'all''' was the twin brother of [[J'uoch]] and leader of a criminal [[J'uoch's mining camp|mining outfit]].

==Biography==
While searching for a data disk, which contained information on the treasure ship [[Queen of Ranroon/Legends|''Queen of Ranroon'']], he, [[J'uoch]], and their criminal band stole the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]]. He was killed on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] when his ship was shot down by a blast from [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Kell Mark II]].

{{Char-stub}}
